name: coding
description: Implement, test, prototype, and bootstrap Playprint with focused workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Implementation, TDD, prototyping, and Playprint setup.
interface.longDescription: Focused coding workflows for implementing approved work, developing in test-first slices, building throwaway prototypes that answer design questions, and explicitly bootstrapping a pinned Playprint workspace.
defaultPrompt: Use $playprint-bootstrap to initialize Playprint in this Host Game Repository.
